script: A=/home/azureuser/.aixa-bot/activities.jsonl; O=/home/azureuser/.aixa-bot/outbound.jsonl; E=/home/azureuser/.aixa-bot/responder-errors.log; D=/home/azureuser/.aixa-bot/responder-debug.log; echo '===== ACTIVITY LOG: total + last 5 senders ====='; echo "Total entries: $(wc -l < $A)"; tail -5 $A | jq -r '. as $env | (.body | fromjson) as $b | "  ts=" + (.ts // "?") + " type=" + ($b.type // "?") + " from_aad=" + ($b.from.aadObjectId // "none") + " name=" + ($b.from.name // "?")' 2>&1; echo; echo '===== OUTBOUND LOG: total + last 5 ====='; if [ -f $O ]; then echo "Total replies sent: $(wc -l < $O)"; tail -5 $O | jq -r '"  ts=" + (.ts // "?") + " chat=" + ((.chat_id // "?")[:30]) + " preview=" + ((.text // "") | tostring | .[:80])' 2>&1; else echo '  (no outbound.jsonl — Aixa has never replied)'; fi; echo; echo '===== ALLOWED AAD IDS (from responder source) ====='; grep -E 'USER_AAD_ID|YOO_AAD_ID' /home/azureuser/aixa-responder.py | head -4; echo; echo '===== ERRORS LOG (full) ====='; cat $E 2>/dev/null; echo; echo '===== DEBUG LOG (last 25 lines) ====='; tail -25 $D 2>/dev/null; echo; echo '===== JOURNAL (last 30 min, app lines) ====='; journalctl -u aixa-responder.service -u aixa-bot.service --since '30 minutes ago' --no-pager 2>/dev/null | grep -v 'systemd\[1\]' | tail -30
